features.title: Tenant Provisioning
features.description: Create and configure tenant workspaces without exposing platform controls to tenant users.

features.title: Access Governance
features.description: Review platform-wide access and keep operator workflows separate from tenant authentication.

loginPage.footnote: Tenant admins and learners should sign in from their tenant URL.
loginPage.formDescription: Use your super-admin account to create tenants, manage domains, and oversee platform access.
loginPage.heading: Platform Operations
loginPage.subheading: A dedicated control surface for SparkTool operators

marketing.heroTitle: Operate SparkTool without leaking tenant concerns into the platform surface.
marketing.heroDescription: Platform branding, auth rules, and operator messaging are resolved from persisted configuration so the platform can evolve independently from tenant experiences.

highlights.title: Separated access
highlights.description: Platform operators sign in here. Tenant admins and learners continue from tenant-specific routes.

highlights.title: DB-backed rendering
highlights.description: Branding, login copy, and surface messaging come from stored configuration and are applied through CSS variables.

highlights.title: Route-owned theming
highlights.description: Platform and tenant entry points set their own CSS variables so each surface stays isolated and predictable.
